name: conservation-agreement
title: Conservation Insight — Provider Agreement Over Time
subtitle: how closely the five providers track the common estimate, year by year
description: A conservation-insight showcase focused on cross-provider agreement — the ensemble trend against the common estimate, a year-by-provider agreement heatmap, the yearly spread between the highest and lowest provider estimate, and each provider's average deviation from the common estimate.

dataAccesses.name: AgreementKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS agreement_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT year) AS year_count, COUNT(DISTINCT provider) AS providers, ROUND(MAX(spread_pct),1) AS widest_gap_pct FROM v_provider_agreement

dataAccesses.name: AgreementTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS pct FROM v_provider_agreement WHERE ${sinceYear} = '%' OR year >= ${sinceYear} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AgreementYears
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM v_provider_agreement ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AgreementGrid
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),0) AS pct FROM v_provider_agreement GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: AgreementSpreadByYear
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, ROUND(MAX(pct) - MIN(pct),1) AS spread_pct FROM v_provider_agreement GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AvgDeviationByProvider
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT provider, ROUND(AVG(ABS(pct - median_pct)),1) AS avg_deviation_pct FROM v_provider_deviation GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Provider Agreement
kpis.info: Common-estimate agreement across all years and providers — higher means tighter alignment.

kpis.label: Years Tracked
kpis.info: Distinct report years covered by the ensemble.

kpis.label: Providers Compared
kpis.info: Independent data providers contributing an adoption estimate.

kpis.label: Widest Yearly Gap
kpis.info: The largest spread between the highest and lowest provider estimate in a single year.

panels.title: Provider Trend vs. Common Estimate
panels.sub: responds to the Since-year filter above
panels.info: Each provider's yearly estimate against the bold common-estimate median, 2015–2025.

panels.title: Year × Provider Agreement
panels.info: Where providers agree year over year — and where estimates diverge.

panels.title: Yearly Spread Between Providers
panels.info: How far apart the highest and lowest provider estimate landed, year by year.

panels.title: Average Deviation by Provider
panels.info: Each provider's average distance from the common estimate across every tracked year.
